view.title: Validate explicit UC need #3
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement that existing bookings retain old form requirements is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 3 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement that existing bookings retain old form requirements is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided confirms that existing bookings created before the update continue to use the old form version, while new bookings utilize the updated version. This is explicitly stated in the linked use case, which describes how bookings from February use version 2, while those from March use version 3. The prior step evidence shows that both bookings reference the same offer version ID, indicating that the system correctly maintains the historical context for existing bookings, thus fulfilling the requirement.
